title: InfraFactory Scenario
description: Schema for InfraFactory scenario YAML files. Validated at parse time by the Go loader via santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema.

scenario.description: Unique scenario identifier. Used for output directory naming (output/{scenario}/).

aws_resource_anchors.description: List of per-API resource types this scenario asserts end-to-end coverage for (e.g., 'aws_iam_role', 'aws_s3_bucket'). Required on cloud:aws scenarios; ignored on others. Feeds S48-T7's TestFullCoverageAudit so coarse-grained scenario keys like 'compute' don't trivially claim coverage of multiple AWS resources. See fakeaws/concepts.md "Required surface" item 2.

description.description: Human-readable description of the scenario's intent. Passed to the agent in all 3 phases.

type.description: Scenario type. Omit for training/regression scenarios. Set to 'holdout' for holdout scenarios.

references.description: Path to the training scenario this criteria-only holdout validates against (e.g., 'scenarios/training/web-app-paris.yaml'). Only valid when type=holdout.

resources.description: Infrastructure resources to provision. Required for training, regression, and full holdout scenarios. Omitted for criteria-only holdouts.

constraints.description: Constraints applied to generated infrastructure. Boolean constraints map to OPA policies via constraint_policies in infrafactory.yaml.

region.description: Required Scaleway region (e.g., fr-par, nl-ams, pl-waw).

acceptance_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria checked by the validation harness. All must pass for convergence.

purpose.description: Logical purpose (e.g., web-server, api-server, worker). Passed to agent for naming.

size.description: T-shirt size resolved to Scaleway offering via mappings.yaml.

count.description: Number of compute instances to provision.

override.description: Prescriptive overrides. Take priority over size mappings.

offer.description: Exact Scaleway commercial type (e.g., DEV1-S, GP1-M).

private_network.description: Whether to create a private network within the VPC.

exposure.description: Whether the load balancer has a public IP.

size.description: T-shirt size resolved to Scaleway node type via mappings.yaml.

override.description: Prescriptive overrides. Take priority over size mappings.

node_type.description: Exact Scaleway node type (e.g., DB-DEV-S, DB-GP-XS).

size.description: T-shirt size resolved to Scaleway node type + count via mappings.yaml.

override.description: Prescriptive overrides. Take priority over size mappings.

node_type.description: Exact Scaleway node type for pool nodes.

node_count.description: Exact number of nodes in the default pool.

purpose.description: Purpose of the Redis cluster (e.g., cache, session-store). Passed to agent for naming.

size.description: T-shirt size resolved to Scaleway Redis node type via mappings.yaml.

override.description: Prescriptive overrides. Take priority over size mappings.

node_type.description: Exact Scaleway Redis node type (e.g., RED1-MICRO, RED1-S).

purpose.description: Purpose of the object storage bucket (e.g., backups, static-assets). Passed to agent for naming.

size.description: T-shirt size hint for storage class / capacity expectations.

purpose.description: Purpose of the Pub/Sub topic (e.g., events, audit-log). Passed to agent for naming.

subscription.description: Whether to provision a default pull subscription on the topic.

domain.description: Fully-qualified domain name for the managed zone (e.g., test.example.invalid).

record_set.description: Whether to provision a default A-record under the zone.

purpose.description: Purpose of the Cloud Run service (e.g., api, worker). Passed to agent for naming.

image.description: Container image to deploy. Defaults to a documented placeholder when omitted.

purpose.description: Purpose of the secret bundle (e.g., db-credentials, api-tokens). Passed to agent for naming.

version.description: Whether to provision an initial secret version.

dynamodb_resource.description: AWS DynamoDB NoSQL table. Added in S43-T9 for cloud:aws scenarios. Reusing 'database' was rejected because DynamoDB's NoSQL shape (PK/SK, attribute projections) doesn't fit a generic database envelope.

purpose.description: Purpose of the table (e.g., session-store, event-log). Passed to agent for naming.

messaging_resource.description: Cloud-neutral messaging service: SQS on AWS, Pub/Sub on GCP. The slot is intentionally cloud-neutral so future Pub/Sub-style services from other clouds can reuse it.

purpose.description: Purpose of the queue/topic (e.g., job-queue, notifications).

fifo.description: Whether the queue is FIFO (AWS only — GCP Pub/Sub doesn't have a direct FIFO equivalent).

purpose.description: Purpose of the container registry (e.g., app-images, ci-artifacts). Passed to agent for naming.

is_public.description: Whether the registry namespace is publicly accessible.

purpose.description: Purpose of the IAM setup (e.g., service-account, ci-cd). Passed to agent for naming.

application.description: Whether to create an IAM application.

api_key.description: Whether to create an API key for the application.

policy.description: Whether to create a policy for the application.

from.description: Source: 'public_internet' or a resource category from the scenario (e.g., 'compute').

to.description: Target: a resource category from the scenario (e.g., 'database', 'compute').

port.description: Optional port to check connectivity on.

check.description: Policy name matching a key in constraint_policies (e.g., 'encryption_at_rest').

target.description: Optional resource type to scope the policy check (e.g., 'database'). Passed to OPA as input.target.

domain.description: Domain to resolve. Supports {{scenario_name}} template variable.
